_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: synergies are stronger for the MPNST-SP-01 cell line at 48h, while they are weaker and similar between the S462 and sNF96.2 cell lines
details: Showed stronger synergies at 48h treatment compared to S462 and sNF96.2 cell lines
